summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Suburbmates iteration 3 Huly-aligned UI overhaul. All newly updated pages (Help, Privacy, Terms, Cookies, Login, Signup) render perfectly with dark premium design, proper text contrast, and interactive elements working flawlessly.
passed_tests: Help page (/help) renders with perfect Huly design: pill badge with blue-violet atmosphere accent, FAQ accordion with numbered items (01-07), sidebar tabs (FAQ/Support/Contact) working correctly, rounded cards throughout interface
Privacy page (/privacy) renders with dark background (rgb(9, 9, 15)), readable light text (rgb(240, 240, 245)), proper prose styling with legal layout, clear section structure
Terms page (/terms) renders with consistent dark background and readable text, proper legal layout styling, clear section headings
Cookies page (/cookies) renders with consistent dark background and readable text, proper legal layout styling
Login page (/auth/login) renders with rounded glass card design, Google auth button, email input field, magic link CTA, consistent orange CTA buttons (rgb(249, 115, 22))

Signup page (/auth/signup) renders with clean form (name/email inputs), creator checkbox functionality working, business name field appears when creator selected, submit button text changes appropriately

Directory page (/regions) loads with proper Huly design: 'The Creator Feed' heading, search functionality, category filters (Trending, Design, Software, Photography, Marketing, Consulting), region filter dropdowns
All text readable with excellent contrast - light text (rgb(240, 240, 245)) on dark background (rgb(9, 9, 15))
Consistent orange CTA buttons (rgb(249, 115, 22)) appear across all pages
Blue-violet atmosphere accents used consistently for pills, badges, and labels
Rounded borders (xl/2xl/pill) used consistently throughout all pages
FAQ accordion on help page expands/collapses correctly with numbered items
Contact modal functionality working on help page
Creator checkbox functionality working on signup page with dynamic business name field
Magic link authentication working on both login and signup pages
All form inputs functional and accepting text correctly
Navigation between pages working correctly
Plus Jakarta Sans font family correctly implemented
No dark-text-on-dark-background issues found anywhere
Atmospheric glows and glass effects present for visual depth
All interactive elements have proper hover states and transitions
